ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific species name */,
  "family" TEXT /* Plant family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant */,
  "common_names" TEXT /* Additional common names for the plant */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Geographic origin of the plant species */,
  "growth_cycle" TEXT /* Typical growth cycle of the plant (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth stage */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant being studied */,
  "metamer" INTEGER /* Identifier for the growth stage (metamer) */,
  "organ" TEXT /* Organ type being measured (e.g., blade, root) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the growth stage was observed */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the plant at the growth stage */,
  "leaf_area" REAL /* Leaf area of the plant at the growth stage */,
  "root_depth" REAL /* Depth of the root system at the growth stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_stages_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biochemical_data" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biochemical record */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the growth stage */,
  "element" TEXT /* Type of biochemical element measured */,
  "Nresidual" REAL /* N-residual value */,
  "Nstruct" REAL /* N-structural value */,
  "amino_acids" INTEGER /* Count of amino acids present */,
  "cytokinins" REAL /* Level of cytokinins present */,
  "fructan" REAL /* Amount of fructans present */,
  "date_sampled" TEXT /* Date when the biochemical data was sampled */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for biochemical analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biochemical_data_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES growth_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth condition record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant being studied */,
  "is_growing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plant is currently growing */,
  "is_over" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plant has reached maturity */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the plant in meters */,
  "max_mstruct" REAL /* Maximum structural integrity measurement */,
  "max_proteins" REAL /* Maximum protein content measurement */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the growth conditions were observed */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity in the environment */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in which the plant is growing */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_conditions_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_levels" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient level record */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the growth stage */,
  "nitrates" REAL /* Level of nitrates measured */,
  "proteins" REAL /* Protein content value */,
  "senesced_mstruct" REAL /* Measurement of senesced structural integrity */,
  "starch" REAL /* Amount of starch present */,
  "sucrose" REAL /* Level of sucrose present */,
  "date_sampled" TEXT /* Date when the nutrient levels were sampled */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for nutrient analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_levels_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES growth_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for easier communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory the researcher is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead researcher for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Collaborating institutions or researchers */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what was observed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who made the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the observation was made */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for data analysis */,
  "date_analyzed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the record */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions during data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded during the observation period */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the observation period */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the field */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the observation period */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation during the observation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_records_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Lead Researcher, Assistant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
